panels.description: Reading guide for the validation dashboard. This dashboard is a regression guard for comparable HTTP phase semantics, not a production Internet benchmark.

options.content: PASS when Blackbox Success is 1, p50 absolute phase delta is near or below 5 ms for tiny Docker-network phases, and p50 normalized/relative delta is near or below 20%. Treat isolated spikes as outliers; investigate only phases that stay above threshold for 10-15 minutes. This dashboard validates comparable HTTP phases only: NetSonar dns_resolve/tcp_connect/tls_handshake/ttfb/transfer vs Blackbox resolve/connect/tls/processing/transfer.

panels.title: How To Read This Dashboard

panels.description: Minimum Blackbox probe_success across the selected validation targets. Must be 1 before timing deltas are meaningful; if this is 0, fix the reference probe or target first.
panels.title: Blackbox Success

panels.description: Per-phase p50 absolute difference between matching NetSonar and Blackbox HTTP phases over the last 5 minutes, shown as stat tiles for each selected target. Values near or below 5 ms are expected for tiny local Docker-network phases.

targets.expr: abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="dns_resolve"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="resolve"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tcp_connect"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="connect"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls_handshake"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="ttfb"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="processing"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]))

panels.title: p50 Absolute Delta Summary

panels.description: Per-phase p50 absolute delta over 5 minutes. Use this to identify which phase differs: dns_resolve vs resolve, tcp_connect vs connect, tls_handshake vs tls, ttfb vs processing, transfer vs transfer.

targets.expr: abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="dns_resolve"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="resolve"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tcp_connect"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="connect"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls_handshake"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="ttfb"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="processing"}[5m]))

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]))

panels.title: p50 Absolute Phase Delta

panels.description: Per-phase p50 delta over 5 minutes divided by the Blackbox p50 reference phase, with the denominator clamped to 25 ms. For tiny phases this behaves like absolute delta / 25 ms, so use it together with the absolute delta panel.

targets.expr: abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="dns_resolve"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="resolve"}[5m])) / on(target_name) clamp_min(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="resolve"}[5m]), 0.025)

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tcp_connect"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="connect"}[5m])) / on(target_name) clamp_min(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="connect"}[5m]), 0.025)

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls_handshake"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls"}[5m])) / on(target_name) clamp_min(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="tls"}[5m]), 0.025)

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="ttfb"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="processing"}[5m])) / on(target_name) clamp_min(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="processing"}[5m]), 0.025)

abs(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_phase_duration_seconds{job="netsonar", probe_type="http", network_path="direct", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]) - on(target_name) quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m])) / on(target_name) clamp_min(quantile_over_time(0.5, probe_http_duration_seconds{job=~"blackbox-.*", target_name=~"$target_name", phase="transfer"}[5m]), 0.025)

panels.title: p50 Normalized Phase Delta

panels.description: p50 total probe duration over 5 minutes for NetSonar and Blackbox on the same validation targets. Values should be in the same scale, but exact equality is not expected.
panels.title: p50 Total Duration
